headline: Truist Highlights Costco’s (COST) Sales Momentum While Flagging Membership Growth Slowdown
summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) is included among the 10 Best Long-Term Dividend Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. Truist raised its price recommendation on Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) to $1,011 from $977 on May 29. It reiterated a Hold rating on the stock. headline: ‘Business equivalent of taking heroin’: Why Costco refuses to raise prices even if no one will notice
summary: Most retailers try to squeeze as much profit as they can out of every sale. Costco takes the opposite approach.
